parsed_review.summary: CP00-700 (RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P02 fixture/test bridge, risk class A, 10 units RP23.P02.M06.S15-RP23.P02.M07.S02) passes independent read-only review with no findings. Implementation in packages/finance-integrations/src/{registry,service,validators,index}.js is purely descriptor-only: it emits frozen objects, and a targeted grep for network/filesystem/credential/SQL operations surfaced only no-write attestation flags (all false) and no-leak guard string literals — no product runtime, writes, or real-data access. The NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:120) zeroes every write/dispatch/persist/expose flag, and validateDescriptor (validators.js:8) actively rejects rows that would open bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime, expose financial payloads, credentials, permission-decision detail, or audit bodies, or load real fixture data. test/model.test.js:28-30 asserts the CP700 descriptor stays runtime-closed with claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-701, and contract.validation.valid=true. The deterministically regenerated contract reports validation.valid=true with the CP700 coverage distribution {ui:1,implementation:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,contract:1} and micro-title split {Synthetic Fixture Set:8,Test And Golden Case Set:2} matching the pack baseline exactly, and the CP700 descriptor sub-validation valid:true/errors:[]. Pack evidence is internally consistent and makes no inflated claim: manifest, command-evidence, construction-inspection, and adjudication all report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true, status in_progress/pending_review — the pack is pending exactly this hardened review. The live plan (live_state.pack_id=CP00-700) and next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id=CP00-700) agree with the manifest. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer: the runner (run-closeout-pack-claude-review.mjs) and hardening lib enforce Read,Grep,Glob only, forbid Bash/Edit/Write/WebFetch/mcp__, and reject auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields; Hermes patterns appear only as descriptor-only control-plane evidence packets (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Readiness and auth preflight passed cleanly (prompt 2443B under the 25600B cap, no embedded full diff/source, forbidden_tools_present=false). The human/enterprise-trust final-approval boundary is closed outside this receipt and the pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so per instruction blocks_goal_closeout is not set on that basis. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues; pack is closeout-eligible.
